title.en: Grue Languages — Blue and Green Share a Word

subtitle.en: many languages cover blue and green with one term — 'grue'; the split into separate words is the Berlin-Kay stage V transition
subtitle.ko: 많은 언어가 청·녹을 단일어로 — Welsh glas, Vietnamese xanh, Tarahumara siyóname

description.en: Welsh 'glas' applies to both grass and sky; English splits them. Toggle to compare.
description.ko: Welsh 'glas'는 grass와 sky 모두; English는 분리. 토글로 비교.
